'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 10''' is the tenth issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in [[January]] [[1997]]. This issue's theme focused on the then-upcoming [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|''Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition]]''.

The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 10, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with two promotional trading cards, one featuring [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] for Topps' ''[[Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition Widevision]]'' set and another highlighting issue 10's cover art by [[Joe Jusko]]. This issue also included the fold-out poster article ''[[What's New in the Trilogy]]''.
